description: A fragrant ointment for healing or soothing; what comforts through touch. 'Thelai' names what soothes—the gentle application that eases pain.
sound_symbolism: The word soothes with gentle breath. 'The' /θe/ whispers with healing touch, comfort approaching. 'La' flows with soothing application, balm spreading. Then 'i' settles into relief, pain easing.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo thelai' (the balm). Applied externally unlike 'nepha' (medicine). For wounds, soreness, skin ailments.

pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Balms soothed wounds—herbal preparations applied with care, healing through touch.
pillars.peace-linguistics-practices: Words as balm—gentle speech that soothes emotional wounds, comfort through communication.
